name: Follow-Up Visit Codes (7-Day and 30-Day)
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for outpatient follow-up visits after hospitalization or emergency department visits. Used in follow-up after hospitalization for mental illness (FUH), follow-up after ED visit (FUM), and transitional care management measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Office or other outpatient visit, established patient, level 1
Office or other outpatient visit, established patient, level 2
Office or other outpatient visit, established patient, level 3
Office or other outpatient visit, established patient, level 4
Office or other outpatient visit, established patient, level 5
Transitional care management services, moderate complexity, face-to-face visit within 14 days of discharge
Transitional care management services, high complexity, face-to-face visit within 7 days of discharge
Psychiatric diagnostic evaluation with medical services
Hospital outpatient clinic visit for assessment and management of a patient
